seoTitle: Dumgree vs Dundarrah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dumgree and Dundarrah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dumgree and Dundarrah.
heading: Dumgree vs Dundarrah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dumgree, Queensland and Dundarrah, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dundarrah has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Dumgree (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dumgree or Dundarrah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dumgree has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Dundarrah scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dumgree scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Dundarrah scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dumgree or Dundarrah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dundarrah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
